data.title: Notice on the Supplement to the Agenda of the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of Vilkyškių pieninė AB to be held on 27 April 2026
data.description: Vilkyškių pieninė AB, with company code 277160980 and office at P. Lukošaičio g. 14, Vilkyškiai, LT-99254 Pagėgiai municipality, is amending the agenda of its upcoming general meeting on 27 April 2026. Agenda item 3, focusing on the approval of the Company’s 2025 consolidated and separate annual management report, will now be split into two separate items: 3. Approval of the Company’s 2025 separate and consolidated annual management report, excluding remuneration details. 4. Approval of the Company’s remuneration information as part of the 2025 consolidated annual management report.

data.title: Tim Draper Accurately Predicted Bitcoin At $10,000 — Now He Has 'Reason To Believe' It Will Go To $250,000 In 18 Months
data.description: Prominent venture capitalist Tim Draper has made a bold prediction regarding Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), suggesting that the cryptocurrency will surge to $250,000 within the next 18 months, citing inflationary concerns surrounding the US dollar. Draper previously accurately forecasted in 2014 that Bitcoin would reach $10,000 in three years. While he acknowledged that not all his subsequent predictions have been as accurate, he expressed confidence in the potential for Bitcoin to skyrocket to $250,000 in the near future. Draper emphasized that as Bitcoin's value increases and the dollar weakens due to inflation, he anticipates even further growth in the cryptocurrency's value. Draper’s optimistic outlook on Bitcoin's future suggests a significant increase from the current value, with a potential for even higher figures.

data.title: Travelers Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Before the market opens on Thursday, April 16th, The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings. Analysts anticipate the New York-based company to reveal earnings of $6.99 per share for the quarter, a significant increase from $1.91 per share in the same period last year. The consensus among analysts projects Travelers to generate $11.11 billion in quarterly revenue, up from $10.71 billion reported last year. On January 21st, the company exceeded expectations with its fourth-quarter earnings. As of Tuesday's close, Travelers' stock price dipped 0.6% to $299.59. For the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where they can filter results by different variables. To explore how Benzinga's most accurate analysts have rated the company recently, access the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: PlanHub Appoints David Fleischman as Chief Product Officer
data.description: An experienced professional with a background at prominent companies like Angi, Expedia, Apple, and Microsoft has recently joined PlanHub, a construction marketplace based in WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. The individual will be focusing on enhancing AI-driven product innovation aimed at improving customer experience. The appointment was made public on April 15, 2026. PlanHub is recognized as a top preconstruction bidding platform in the industry.

data.title: Notice of Issuance of New Shares in Connection with the Introduction of the Employee Stock Ownership Plan, Matters Relating to Stock Units and Determination of Payment Amount and Other Matters of Issuance of New Shares Under Prior RSU Award
data.description: Nxera Pharma Co. Ltd, based in Tokyo, Japan and Cambridge, UK, has disclosed on 15 April 2026, the implementation of an Employee Stock Ownership Plan known as J-ESOP for its employees in Japan. The company, listed as TSE 4565, has decided to issue new shares as part of the J-ESOP Share Issuance. This issuance aims to provide the necessary shares for the J-ESOP's functioning, which includes transitioning certain outstanding Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) granted to Japanese employees of Nxera Pharma Japan Co., Ltd and Nxera Co. The issuance does not result in any extra dilution beyond what was initially anticipated under the Outstanding Equity Awards.

data.title: Scammers target crypto users with elaborate fraud using note app, spreading malicious software; many affected.
data.description: Elastic Security Labs has reported a complex social engineering scheme targeting individuals in the crypto and finance sectors. The scam involves leveraging a community plugin feature on a note-taking application to distribute harmful device-controlling software. This sophisticated attack poses a significant threat to users, highlighting the importance of staying vigilant and implementing robust security measures.

data.title: Global Air Cargo Market Outlook | 5.3% CAGR Fueled by E-Commerce Surge & Cross-Border Trade | Digital Logistics Innovations Accelerate Supply Chain Efficiency
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, on April 15, 2026, a recent market analysis by Future Market Insights revealed a promising outlook for the global air cargo market. This sector is expected to experience continuous growth due to factors such as the rise of e-commerce, increased cross-border trade, and advancements in digital logistics. These factors are reshaping the industry and driving its expansion.

data.title: Bank of America, Morgan Stanley And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
data.description: This morning, U.S. stock futures showed a mix in trading sentiment. Investors are anticipating the release of quarterly earnings reports, particularly focusing on Bank of America Corp. (NYSE: BAC). Analysts are expecting the company to report earnings of $1.01 per share, with a revenue of $29.89 billion, before the market opens. Meanwhile, Bank of America's shares saw a slight increase of 0.1% to $53.39 in after-hours trading. On another note, ASML Holding NV (NASDAQ: ASML) reported positive first-quarter results, leading to an increase in their projected revenue for 2026. This news caused ASML shares to rise by 0.7% to $1,528.46 in after-hours trading. For a more detailed story, visit the news platform Benzinga.com.
